text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I go looking for Taiki Shuttle to see how she's
doing before the race...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Okay. On the fourth corner, I'll kick it into high
gear, and...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Oh, hey there, Trainer! You gotta say somethin'
when you come in!
choice_data_list: Sorry, it looked like you were focusing.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, 'course I was! A real cowgirl knows ya gotta
get in the zone before a showdown!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna show ya a true Texan quick draw out
there on the turf!
